Material.description: Represents Frame Material as per RAM

FrameType.description: Represents Frame Type as per RAM

FloorType.description: Represents Floor Type element is placed on as per RAM

IsStubCantilever.description: Represents if the element is a stub cantilever in RAM

StartCantilever.description: Represents the start cantilever distance (if applicable) in RAM

EndCantilever.description: Represents the end cantilever distance (if applicable) in RAM

IsHangingColumn.description: Represents if the element is a hanging column in RAM

Studs.description: Number of studs applied to frame

DesignCapacityInteraction.description: Design Capacity Interaction as per RAM

CriticalDeflectionInteraction.description: Critical Deflection Interaction as per RAM

_t.description: Optional Type discirminator for BHoM type.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional Version of BHoM used when generating the object.
